name: Asparagus Salad with Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil.
2. Wash the asparagus and snap off the tough bottoms of the stems.
3. When the water is boiling, add the asparagus and let it return to a boil.
4. Cook for about 3 minutes, until the asparagus is crisp but tender.
5. Remove the asparagus and run it under cold water. Refrigerate to chill.
6. At serving time, line six salad plates with lettuce.
7. Arrange four spears on each plate.
8. Top salads with 1 tablespoon Buttermilk Mayonnaise or 1 tablespoon Prepared Light Mayonnaise.
9. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon chopped pecans.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE; CHO: 9g; PRO: 3g; FAT: 2g; CAL: 41
Low-sodium diets: This recipe is excellent.
